name: Perkins Oil & Gas, Inc.
summary: Perkins Oil & Gas, Inc., an exploration stage company, focuses on the exploration and development of oil and gas properties. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Dallas, Texas. Perkins Oil & Gas, Inc. is a subsidiary of Regale Consultants Ltd. As of February 3, 2017, Perkins Oil & Gas, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Regale Consultants Ltd.
